faculty_fit.description: Semantic similarity between faculty research profile and focus area description

team_feasibility.description: Can this person contribute to a viable multi-disciplinary team?
team_feasibility.method: Claude API evaluation of departmental complementarity and role specificity

competitive_edge.description: Does this faculty member bring unique advantages to the proposal?
competitive_edge.method: Claude API evaluation of unique facilities, datasets, partnerships, methods

partnership_readiness.description: Evidence of relevant partnerships with national labs, industry, multi-institutional projects
partnership_readiness.method: Claude API evaluation of collaboration history and existing partnerships
